title: 縮圖製作模組包 Thumbnail Maker
description: 用於製作縮圖 use for making thumbnails
body:
Thumbnail Modpack
 

Modpacks include:
-[Custom NPCs custom character module] v20220515 Traditional Chinese

-Screenshot Viewer

 

Installation:

Download using modrinth app.

 

Function:
Use custom NPC to create character puppets with different actions
Add different decorations to the character such as wings and bunny ears
Complete a beautiful photo with light and shadow
Screenshot Viewer makes it easier for you to view your screenshots, making your work easier.

Modpack production: E_son

Modpack support : https://discord.gg/NH7GqbHFrU

modpack is from CurseForge also made by me : [https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/modpacks/thumbnail-maker](https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/modpacks/thumbnail-maker)

ComplementaryShaders_v4.3.3.zip: [https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/shaders/complementary-reimagined](https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/shaders/complementary-reimagined)
Camera Mod : [https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/mc-mods/camera-mod](https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/mc-mods/camera-mod)
